div.style: font-size:0.52rem; color:#546E7A; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; line-height:1;
font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:0.48rem; color:#6BBF4E; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px;
font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:900; color:#A8E063; line-height:1.1; letter-spacing:-1px;

td.style: padding:0; height:290px; overflow:hidden; background:#070f09; position:relative; line-height:0; font-size:0;

div.style: position:relative; width:100%; height:290px; overflow:hidden;
position:absolute; bottom:18px; left:22px; right:22px; z-index:7;

span.t-att-style: 'display:inline-block; padding:5px 18px; border-radius:4px; ' + 'background:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#6BBF4E') + '1A; ' + 'border:1.5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#6BBF4E') + '55; ' + 'font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif; font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:700; ' + 'letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; ' + 'color:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#A8E063') + ';'
